strengths: All 5 API methods follow existing request<T>() pattern consistently
uploadLogo correctly bypasses request() for FormData (Content-Type must not be set manually)
SSE handler parses event and conditionally refreshes settings with try/catch for keep-alive comments
Default settings state matches server-side DEFAULT_SETTINGS (boardName: 'Camel', logoPath: '/logo.png', version: 0)
settingsVersion derived from settings.version in refreshSettings — single source of truth for optimistic locking
All 5 tests use dynamic import with mocked fetch for proper isolation
